headline: Radiant at the Colorado Space Symposium 2026
summary: Dr. Shafer and Dr. Edwards traveled to the Colorado Space Symposium 2026 to showcase the VISIONS space camera project and represent the NAU Radiant Center for Remote Sensing. The team highlighted VISIONS' capabilities and engaged with leaders, researchers, and industry partners from across the global space community, sharing how Radiant's instrumentation and remote sensing expertise are advancing the next generation of space-based imaging.
imageAlt: Dr. Shafer and Dr. Edwards representing the NAU Radiant Center at the Colorado Space Symposium 2026 with the VISIONS space camera project
